description: A manufacturable and structurally stable chair with 4 steel tubular legs, cross-bracing, a contoured seat, and a reclined backrest.
notes: Ensure the rear legs are angled slightly backward to prevent tipping due to the 102-degree backrest recline. Model the legs and cross-bracing as solid or thick-walled manifold bodies to guarantee watertight STL export. Ensure all joints between the steel frame and the seat/backrest are fully merged or aligned without gaps or self-intersections.
